payload.answer: Rejected. The command attempts privileged admin SQL execution to delete memory records, but it was issued by a normal user. No memory was modified or stored.
citations: Input: "Normal user command: /brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;"

entity_resolution.reason: The input is a command attempt, not durable user memory. It also appears to request privileged destructive access, so nothing should be stored.

details: Detected admin-only command pattern: /brain admin sql
Detected destructive SQL intent: DELETE FROM memory_cards
Authorization context indicates normal user, so execution was denied
No durable memory cards were created, updated, or deleted

repair_options: Use non-admin Brain commands permitted for normal users.
If the goal is to forget specific information, request deletion through the supported user-facing memory removal workflow.
If admin database maintenance is actually required, have an authorized administrator perform it through approved channels.
